home_description: I-Bitcoin iyimali engcono eyakha umhlaba ongcono. I-Bitcoin ivikele amalungelo abantu, yasindisa abantu kunfleshini ephezulu, yasekela abalimi bendawo, yanciphisa ukukhishwa kwegesi ekumbeni uwoyela, nokunye okuningi.
home_intro: I-Bitcoin iyimali engcono eyakha umhlaba ongcono. Thepha isigaba ngezansi ukuze ufunde ukuthi i-Bitcoin ikwenza kanjani kube ngcono, noma uqale ukukhuphuka ukuze uhlole.
